title: MTVehicles
body:
If you need support for the plugin join the Discord server for help. Below you can see the functions commands and permissions. If you have a bug or suggestion, we recommend that you join our Discord server! https://discord.gg/vehicle

- ✅ Add custom vehicles.
- ✅ Adjust vehicle data in game.
- ✅ Reloading/Restarting the server is possible with vehicles in the folder.
- ✅ Gasoline function customizable in config.
- ✅ All current vehicles + helicopters.
- ✅ Tanks which can shoot TNTs (must be enabled in config.yml)!
- ✅ ANWB - Disable picking up vehicles if it is in the water.
- ✅ Trunks per vehicle & customizable.
- ✅ Vehicle edit function.
- ✅ Adjustable speed per vehicle.
- ✅ Vouchers for vehicles.
- ✅ Vehicles can take damage and be broken (must be enabled in config.yml).
- ✅ Integration with WorldGuard and Vault.
- ✅ Active support/developers.
- ✅ Open Source.

- /vehicle info - informatie
- /vehicle help - help command
- /vehicle addrider - add someone (driver) to the car
- /vehicle addmember - add someone to the car
- /vehicle removerider - remove someone (driver) from the car
- /vehicle removemember - remove someone from the car
- /vehicle edit - an advanced menu to customize vehicles
- /vehicle menu - a menu to pick vehicles
- /vehicle fuel - get a jerrycan
- /vehicle setowner - put the owner of the car
- /vehicle restore - restore data
- /vehicle reload - reload the plugin
- /vehicle update - update the plugin
- /vehicle delete - remove the vehicle in your hand

- mtvehicles.setowner
- mtvehicles.admin
